contributes.translates.cloudflare.title: Cloudflare translate
configuration.title: Cloudflare Translate
configuration.cloudflareTranslate.accoun: Cloudflare Account ID used for Workers AI API requests.
configuration.cloudflareTranslate.apiTok: Cloudflare API Token with Workers AI permissions.
Cloudflare API Token with Workers AI permissions. It is recommended to store this in VS Code Secret Storage-aware sync settings if available.
Workers AI model name, for example @cf/meta/llama-3.1-8b-instruct.
configuration.cloudflareTranslate.system: Optional system prompt for controlling translation style and behavior.
You are a translation assistant. Return only translated text.
